findings.title: Vibration/Oscillation Drift Detected
findings.description: Blackbox telemetry indicates a 15% increase in Z-axis oscillation during hover transition. Potential motor bearing wear or unbalanced prop.

findings.title: Power Draw Outlier
findings.description: Instantaneous current spike of 45A detected during standard climb. Outlier compared to fleet baseline for similar SRT Mission Profiles.

findings.title: GPS/Signal Instability
findings.description: Satellite count dropped below 8 in 'Facade Sweep' profile area. Spatial trace indicates high multipath potential near structure.

findings.title: Frontend UI Runtime Error / Lucide Icon
findings.description: ReferenceError: Maximize2 is not defined in OversciteDroneVisionUI.tsx. Caused by missing import in the lucide-react block.

traces.inputSummary: Ingested 500ms telemetry slice for vibration analysis.
Searching historical mission profiles for GPS stability benchmarks.
